name: Miglior Canned Dog Food -  Beef & Vegetables Chunks, 405g
shortDescription: (4 pieces minimum order) Formula designed to guarantee the key nutrients required for the well-being of your dog. Vitamin E with antioxidant action and a recipe rich in meat to help keep muscle mass toned.
description: COMPOSITION: Meat and animal derivatives 30% (beef 5%), cereals, vegetables 4%, minerals. ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS: Moisture 75%, Crude protein 8,0%, Crude fat 4,5%, Crude fibres 0,5%, Crude ash 3%. Nutritional additives/kg: Vitamin E 10 mg, Copper (Copper (II) sulphate pentahydrate) 2 mg. HOW TO USE: The product is ready to use. STORAGE INSTRUCTION: Store the product in a cool and dry place, avoiding direct sunlight. Once opened, store in refrigerator for 2-3 days
